subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with most eloquent utterance in all existence: God - there is no God but Him - the Mighty, the Bestower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بافصح البیان فی الامکان الله لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب هذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer
